category_sources: source_facts.description says Python implementation written in Java; the official Jython homepage describes Jython as Python on the JVM.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://www.jython.org/ uses the name Jython; source_facts.name is jython.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides project overview and links to Jython reference material; official jython.org old-sites docs host the Jython 2.5.2 documentation set.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README states the master repository is https://github.com/jython/jython; source_facts.repo was empty so repo was determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python implemented in Java; source_facts.executables lists jython; official homepage says it provides Python benefits on the JVM and access to Java classes.
